Title: User login with valid credentials
Preconditions: User account exists and is active
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the login page.
2. Enter valid email and password.
3. Click the login button.
Expected Result:
- User is redirected to the home page.
- Authentication token is generated and stored.

Title: User login with invalid credentials
Preconditions: User account exists but with incorrect password
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the login page.
2. Enter invalid email and password.
3. Click the login button.
Expected Result:
- Error message is displayed indicating incorrect credentials.
- User remains on the login page.

Title: User registration with valid data
Preconditions: User does not exist in the system
Test Data:
- Name: John Doe
- Email: john.doe@example.com
- Password: P@ssw0rd
- Confirm Password: P@ssw0rd
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the registration page.
2. Fill in all required fields with valid data.
3. Click the register button.
Expected Result:
- User is redirected to the login page.
- New user account is created in the database.

Title: User registration with invalid data
Preconditions: User does not exist in the system
Test Data:
- Name: John Doe
- Email: invalidemail
- Password: short
- Confirm Password: differentpassword
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the registration page.
2. Fill in required fields with invalid data.
3. Click the register button.
Expected Result:
- Error messages are displayed for each invalid field.
- User remains on the registration page.

Title: Create a new emergency with valid data
Preconditions: Coordinator is authenticated
Test Data:
- Description: Fire at location X
- Region: Rome
- Province: Roma
- Start Date: 2023-10-01
- End Date: 2023-10-05
Test Steps:
1. Click "Inserisci emergenza".
2. Enter valid emergency details.
3. Click submit.
Expected Result:
- Emergency is successfully created and saved in the database.
- Confirmation message is displayed.

Title: Create a new emergency with incomplete data
Preconditions: Coordinator is authenticated
Test Data:
- Description: Fire at location X
- Region: 
- Province: 
- Start Date: 
- End Date:
Test Steps:
1. Click "Inserisci emergenza".
2. Enter incomplete emergency details.
3. Click submit.
Expected Result:
- Error message is displayed indicating incomplete data.
- User is prompted to fill in missing fields.

Title: View available emergencies
Preconditions: User is authenticated
Test Steps:
1. Click "Visualizza emergenze".
2. Check if emergencies are available.
Expected Result: - List of available emergencies is displayed.

Title: View no available emergencies
Preconditions: No emergencies in the system
Test Data: - No existing emergencies in the system
Test Steps:
1. Click "Visualizza emergenze".
2. Check if emergencies are available.
Expected Result: - Message "Nessuna emergenza" is displayed.

Title: Terminate an existing emergency
Preconditions: User is authenticated and has permission to terminate emergencies
Test Steps:
1. Send POST request to "/terminaEmergenza".
2. Verify token.
3. Update the database to terminate the emergency.
Expected Result:
- Success message "X emergenza terminata" is received.
- Emergency status is updated in the database.

Title: Attempt to terminate non-existent emergency
Preconditions: User is authenticated and has permission to terminate emergencies
Test Steps:
1. Send POST request to "/terminaEmergenza".
2. Verify token.
3. Attempt to update the database to terminate the emergency.
Expected Result:
- Failure message "Nessuna emergenza terminata" is received.
- No changes made to the database.

Title: Create a new task with valid data
Preconditions: User is authenticated
Test Data:
- Description: Clean up area Y
- Region: Milan
- Province: Milano
- Start Date: 2023-10-01
- End Date: 2023-10-05
Test Steps:
1. Send POST request to "/nuovoCompito".
2. Verify token.
3. Insert task data into the database.
Expected Result:
- Task is successfully created and saved in the database.
- Success message is received.

Title: Create a new task with invalid data
Preconditions: User is authenticated
Test Data:
- Description: 
- Region: 
- Province: 
- Start Date: 
- End Date:
Test Steps:
1. Send POST request to "/nuovoCompito".
2. Verify token.
3. Attempt to insert task data into the database.
Expected Result:
- Error message is received.

Title: Remove a volunteer from a task
Preconditions: Coordinator is authenticated and volunteer is assigned to a task
Test Steps:
1. Click "Visualizza emergenza".
2. Select the task.
3. Check if a volunteer is assigned.
4. Remove the volunteer.
Expected Result:
- Volunteer is successfully removed from the task.
- Confirmation message is displayed.

Title: Attempt to remove a non-assigned volunteer from a task
Preconditions: Coordinator is authenticated and no volunteer is assigned to a task
Test Steps:
1. Click "Visualizza emergenza".
2. Select the task.
3. Check if a volunteer is assigned.
Expected Result:
- Error message is displayed indicating no volunteer is assigned.
- No changes made to the task.

Title: Revoke an existing token
Preconditions: User is authenticated and has a valid token
Test Steps:
1. Send POST request to "/login" with valid credentials.
2. Verify token.
3. Revoke the token in the database.
Expected Result:
- Token is successfully revoked.
- Confirmation message is received.

Title: Attempt to revoke a non-existent token
Preconditions: User is authenticated and has no valid token
Test Steps:
1. Send POST request to "/login" with valid credentials.
2. Verify token.
3. Attempt to revoke the token in the database.
Expected Result:
- Error message is received.
- No changes made to the database.

Title: Assign a user to a task
Preconditions: User and task exist in the system
Test Data:
- User ID: 1
- Task ID: 1
- Start Date: 2023-10-01
- End Date: 2023-10-05
Test Steps:
1. Create a new user-task relationship.
2. Assign the user to the task.
Expected Result:
- User-task relationship is successfully created.
- User is assigned to the task.

Title: Unassign a user from a task
Preconditions: User is assigned to a task
Test Steps:
1. Terminate the user-task relationship.
2. Unassign the user from the task.
Expected Result:
- User-task relationship is successfully terminated.
- User is unassigned from the task.

Title: Associate a user with an emergency
Preconditions: User and emergency exist in the system
Test Steps:
1. Create a new emergency-user association.
2. Associate the user with the emergency.
Expected Result:
- Emergency-user association is successfully created.
- User is associated with the emergency.

Title: Disassociate a user from an emergency
Preconditions: User is associated with an emergency
Test Steps:
1. Terminate the emergency-user association.
2. Disassociate the user from the emergency.
Expected Result:
- Emergency-user association is successfully terminated.
- User is disassociated from the emergency.

Title: Assign a task to a user
Preconditions: User and task exist in the system
Test Data:
- User ID: 1
- Task ID: 1
- Start Date: 2023-10-01
- End Date: 2023-10-05
Test Steps:
1. Create a new task assignment.
2. Assign the task to the user.
Expected Result:
- Task assignment is successfully created.
- Task is assigned to the user.

Title: Unassign a task from a user
Preconditions: User is assigned to a task
Test Steps:
1. Terminate the task assignment.
2. Unassign the task from the user.
Expected Result:
- Task assignment is successfully terminated.
- Task is unassigned from the user.

Title: Delete a user account
Preconditions: User exists in the system
Test Steps:
1. Initiate user deletion process.
2. Delete the user account from the system.
Expected Result:
- User account is successfully deleted.
- All related associations (tasks, emergencies, tokens) are also deleted.

Title: Attempt to delete a non-existent user account
Preconditions: User does not exist in the system
Test Steps:
1. Initiate user deletion process.
2. Attempt to delete the non-existent user account.
Expected Result:
- Error message is received.
- No changes made to the system.

Title: Delete a task
Preconditions: Task exists in the system
Test Steps:
1. Initiate task deletion process.
2. Delete the task from the system.
Expected Result:
- Task is successfully deleted.
- All related associations (assignments, user-task relationships) are also deleted.

Title: Attempt to delete a non-existent task
Preconditions: Task does not exist in the system
Test Steps:
1. Initiate task deletion process.
2. Attempt to delete the non-existent task.
Expected Result
